## Checklist

- [ ] `node test/run.js` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (built-ins only)
- [ ] Hooks still silent-fail (never block a session)
- [ ] Added/updated a test if parsing or redaction changed
- [ ] Cross-platform paths (no hard-coded separators; honors `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` / `ENGRAM_VAULT`)
